**Great ideas come from the community! Thank you for sharing yours.**

## Problem Description

<!-- What problem or pain point would this feature solve? Help us understand the "why" behind your idea. -->

**Example**: "I often need to ... but currently @aiai-go/claude doesn't support ..."

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How do you envision this working? Don't worry if it's not fully fleshed out — rough ideas are great! -->

## Alternative Solutions

<!-- Have you considered any other approaches? This helps us explore the design space. -->

## Use Cases

<!-- Describe specific scenarios where this feature would shine. Real-world examples are especially helpful! -->

1. ...
2. ...

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, screenshots, code examples, links to similar features in other tools — anything that helps illustrate your idea! -->

## Would you like to help build this?

We welcome contributions at all levels! Even if you can't code it yourself, testing and feedback are invaluable.

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this!
- [ ] I can help with testing and feedback
- [ ] Just a suggestion for now

---

**Every feature request helps shape the future of @aiai-go/claude. Thank you!**
